title: steenisia corollina
intro: Steenisia corollina is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Steenisia corollina include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Steenisia corollina include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
